question: The line chart shows annual sales from 2018 to 2022. Which of the following statements is best supported by the chart?

options.B: Sales stayed roughly the same during 2019 and 2020.
options.D: We cannot tell from the chart whether the last two years have equal or different sales because their values extend beyond the visible range.

explanation: The chart clips the tallest bars by using a y-axis max below the data maximum, misleading viewers into thinking the top values are equal.
